title: Ledger
description: Spec-silent shape (spec sec-4 says only 'ledger.json (cluster hash -> card id)'; decision logged in IMPROVEMENT_BACKLOG.md). data/ledger.json is a top-level object keyed by version + entries, where entries maps cluster_hash (sha256 of sorted normalized member URLs, per watcher/clustering.py) to its idempotency record. card_id is null until the Phase 2 analyst publishes a card for that cluster, and stays permanently null for clusters the verifier drops (status 'dropped') -- a later run with new corroborating evidence produces a different cluster_hash, so it is a fresh entry rather than a stuck one. Phase 1 seeds data/ledger.json = {"version": 1, "entries": {}}. Phase 2 extension (logged in IMPROVEMENT_BACKLOG.md): verifier_outcome, already present as a free-form optional field since Phase 1, now has a defined structure ({last_attempted_at, dropped_reason?, demoted_from_confirmed?}), and a status=='dropped' entry's card_id is now schema-enforced to stay null -- both changes are additive/tightening only, so every pre-existing Phase 1 entry (none of which use 'dropped' or 'verifier_outcome') still validates unchanged.

card_id.description: Null until published; permanently null if the cluster was dropped.

status.description: queued/published both represent an 'active' (not permanently dropped) entry per the Phase 2 plan's status vocabulary; 'dropped' is the verifier's permanent, terminal state for a cluster_hash (see the if/then below enforcing card_id stays null in that case).

first_seen.description: First watch.yml run that produced this cluster_hash.

last_seen.description: Most recent watch.yml run that re-derived this same cluster_hash (idempotency: re-runs bump this, not a new entry).

member_urls.description: Normalized member URLs the cluster_hash was derived from.

verifier_outcome.description: Set only when status is 'dropped': the verifier's record of why this cluster_hash was permanently dropped, or (demoted_from_confirmed) that it published but at a lower status than the analyst first assigned. Optional/absent on every entry the verifier has never touched (e.g. every pre-Phase-2 entry, or one still awaiting its first analyst/verifier pass).

last_attempted_at.description: When the verifier last attempted (and, for a dropped entry, gave up on) this cluster_hash.

dropped_reason.description: Human-readable reason the verifier permanently dropped this cluster_hash (e.g. 'no citation survived re-fetch; hollowed-out card').

demoted_from_confirmed.description: True if the verifier demoted this card from CONFIRMED to REPORTED (or stripped it further) rather than dropping it outright.
